{{Quote|I have chosen a system that will provide us with the raw materials and work force necessary for the project. I suspect the Geonosians won't see the benefit in this.|[[Grand Moff/Legends|Grand Moff]] [[Wilhuff Tarkin/Legends|Tarkin]]|<ref name="EaW" />}}
The '''Subjugation of Geonosis''' was an early battle in the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Background==
{{Quote|While you have been off chasing pirates, Vader, I've been informed the Death Star construction project has run low on certain resources and "labor assets".|Tarkin to [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]]|<ref name="EaW" />}}
With the [[Death Star/Legends|Death Star]] project running out of construction slaves, [[Grand Moff/Legends|Grand Moff]] [[Wilhuff Tarkin/Legends|Tarkin]] ordered [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] to go to [[Geonosis/Legends|Geonosis]] and round up the [[Geonosian/Legends|natives]] to use as slave labor.

Unfortunately for Vader, the Geonosians had secretly aligned themselves with the growing [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] and the Geonosians already used as slaves revolted against their [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] masters.

==The battle==
{{Quote|Assemble your forces and lead the attack personally, Lord Vader.|Tarkin to Darth Vader|<ref name="EaW" />}}
[[File:Geonosis_ground.jpg|thumb|left|250px|[[All Terrain Scout Transport/Legends|AT-STs]] fighting Rebels and [[Geonosian/Legends|Geonosians]].]]
A Rebel fleet orbited the planet to prevent the system from being conquered by the Empire. As the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] entered the system, the resistance force ambushed the attackers. Concentrated fire from assault ships eventually brought down the Rebel space station. The survivors were routed out and destroyed by [[TIE series/Legends|TIE]] squadrons.

The [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]] landed on the planet, put down the slave revolt, by destroying some of the hives that the Geonosians resided in, and scattered the remaining rebel resistance. The Rebellion had established a base on Geonosis to support the Geonosians. Vader's troops defeated the Rebel units stationed on Geonosis as well and destroyed the Rebel base.

==Aftermath==
{{Quote|Though the Death Star project is of utmost importance, ensure you do not neglect the rest of the Empire. Rebel and pirate uprisings are becoming more frequent. This contagious behavior must be suppressed!|Tarkin to Darth Vader|<ref name="EaW" />}}
As result of the battle, the Empire then gained a valuable source of slaves to assist in the construction of the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|first Death Star]].

==Behind the scenes==
This battle was the fourth mission of the Imperial campaign in the [[2006]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Empire at War]]''.

The composition of the Imperial force and its casualties vary, depending on the player's actions. However, the presence of Darth Vader (who pilots the TIE Advanced) and Black Squadron is mandatory in the space battle.

==Appearances==
